name: Chicken-Vegetable Tetrazzini
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken and garlic in a 2-quart glass measure.
2. Cover with plastic wrap and vent. Microwave at Medium-High for 4 minutes, stirring once.
3. Add peas; cover and microwave at Medium-High for 4 minutes, stirring once.
4. Stir in mushrooms; cover and microwave at Medium-High for 2 to 3 minutes, or until chicken is done. Drain well. Set aside.
5. Melt oleo in a 2-cup glass measure at High for 30 seconds (or until it melts). Add flour; stir well.
6. Gradually add milk, stirring well. Microwave at High for 4 minutes, or until thick and bubbly, stirring twice.
7. Stir in pimento, dry sherry, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
8. Combine chicken and pasta in a large bowl. Spoon sauce over the mixture and toss well.
(Fat: 6.6g, Cholesterol: 73mg.)
